red_state.expected: Focused server workflow template tests compile and run, then fail for missing US2 import/export dependency-manifest implementation.
failing_tests: Workflow template API contract > POST /api/workflows/templates/import/preview keeps invalid references unselectable with dependency errors
Workflow template API contract > POST /api/workflows/templates/export includes a dependency manifest for every phase skill reference
Workflow template API contract > POST /api/workflows/templates/export does not include skill package contents by default

validation_output.summary: 42 pass, 3 fail, 190 expect() calls, 45 tests across 1 file. Failures are expected RED assertions: import preview does not yet surface invalid-reference dependencyDiagnostics; export still returns schemaVersion 1 without dependencyManifest; export non-bundling test fails because dependencyManifest is absent.

concerns: The import commit preservation test already passes under current behavior; the RED signal is provided by the missing dependency diagnostics and export manifest tests.
The existing foundation import-preview warning test from T004 also passes, confirming missing recommended skills remain selectable with warning diagnostics.
recovery_hints: Implement /api/workflows/templates/export schemaVersion 2 output with dependencyManifest.schemaVersion 1 and one dependency entry per phases[].skills reference.

Populate dependency manifest entries with templateId, phaseId, normalized reference, exportStatus, resolver provenance such as resolvedSource/pluginName/contentHash when available, and diagnostics for degraded dependencies.
Keep default exports limited to template data plus manifest metadata; do not include skill package/file contents.

During import preview, convert invalid-reference manifest/template dependency status into dependencyDiagnostics with severity error and canImport false while preserving existing template validation errors.
During import commit, continue preserving unresolved recommended skill references and unknown skill fields.
